'''Vaufthau Processing Industries''' was a construction company that specialized in urban settings and manufacturing. The company was one of many that became a [[contributing sponsor]] of the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]], the governing body of the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]], sometime after the Authority was expanded by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. This meant that they made financial contributions to the Authority and received a proportional share of investments. They also received limited representation on the [[Executive Directorship Board]] which managed the Authority and discounts on goods from within the [[Sector/Legends|sector]].<ref name="HSCS" /> During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Vaufthau engaged in primary resource extraction and processing on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Goroth Prime/Legends|Goroth Prime]] despite have no previous interest in the field. The [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Administrator/Legends|administrator]] [[Boto del ibn Garl]] lobbied his superiors for resources to bid for secondary exploitation rights. On Goroth, Vaufthau engaged in widespread industrial espionage.<ref name="GSE" />

==Behind the scenes==
Vaufthau Processing Industries was first mentioned in the ''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]'', a sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. The book was released in [[1993]] and written by [[Michael Allen Horne]].
